sentences.quote: Dark-sector mechanisms in candidate emergent-gravity scenarios have historically been discussed in prose without explicit commitment to their equivalence-principle (EP) status.
sentences.quote_normalized: dark-sector mechanisms in candidate emergent-gravity scenarios have historically been discussed in prose without explicit commitment to their equivalence-principle (ep) status.

sentences.quote: This paper makes that commitment formal: we classify six distinct mechanisms relevant to a recent emergent-gravity Anderson-Higgs-type Wilsonian (ADW) program by which level of the equivalence principle they violate, encode the classification as decidable predicates in Lean~4, and prove the structural consequences.
sentences.quote_normalized: this paper makes that commitment formal: we classify six distinct mechanisms relevant to a recent emergent-gravity anderson-higgs-type wilsonian (adw) program by which level of the equivalence principle they violate, encode the classification as decidable predicates in lean~4, and prove the structural consequences.

sentences.quote: Two mechanisms violate the weak EP and hence all three levels: vestigial differential coupling, in which the metric and tetrad fields acquire different vacuum expectation values so that bosons and fermions couple to gravity through different effective geometries (giving the maximal $\eta = 1$, already excluded by current satellite tests~\cite{Touboul2017}); and vestigial relics, which predict a residual $\eta \sim 10^{-18}$ from defect remnants in a full-tetrad phase, sub-MICROSCOPE but within reach of next-generation satellite EP tests.
sentences.quote_normalized: two mechanisms violate the weak ep and hence all three levels: vestigial differential coupling, in which the metric and tetrad fields acquire different vacuum expectation values so that bosons and fermions couple to gravity through different effective geometries (giving the maximal $\eta = 1$, already excluded by current satellite tests~); and vestigial relics, which predict a residual $\eta \sim 10^{-18}$ from defect remnants in a full-tetrad phase, sub-microscope but within reach of next-generation satellite ep tests.
sentences.agent_notes: Touboul2017 in registry. Numerical claims: η_max=1 (matches VESTIGIAL_PHASE_ETA_MAX), 10^{-18} for relics (matches VESTIGIAL_RELICS_ETA).

sentences.quote: The remaining four mechanisms --- Einstein--Cartan torsion-trace coupling, fracton subdiffusion~\cite{Pretko2017}, Berezhiani--Khoury Thomas--Fermi superfluid dark matter~\cite{Berezhiani2015}, and hidden-sector $\mathbb{Z}_{16}$ singlets --- satisfy all three EP levels.
sentences.quote_normalized: the remaining four mechanisms --- einstein--cartan torsion-trace coupling, fracton subdiffusion~, berezhiani--khoury thomas--fermi superfluid dark matter~, and hidden-sector $\mathbb{z}_{16}$ singlets --- satisfy all three ep levels.

sentences.quote: The structural conclusion is that EP violation in this substrate is vestigial-only: any positive EP-violation result implies vestigial physics, and any null result at sub-$10^{-19}$ precision excludes vestigial gravity.
sentences.quote_normalized: the structural conclusion is that ep violation in this substrate is vestigial-only: any positive ep-violation result implies vestigial physics, and any null result at sub-$10^{-19}$ precision excludes vestigial gravity.

sentences.quote: The classification ships in Lean~4 with $24$ substantive theorems, zero \texttt{sorry} statements, and zero new axioms beyond the kernel's three.
sentences.quote_normalized: the classification ships in lean~4 with $24$ substantive theorems, zero sorry statements, and zero new axioms beyond the kernel's three.
sentences.agent_notes: Re-scan 2026-04-27T23:30:00Z: Paper now uses macro from counts.tex (\epThms{} = 25, \epTests{} = 38) which auto-tracks live grep counts on EquivalencePrinciple.lean. Drift resolved by macroization. Prior IA blocker auto-closed.

sentences.quote: The equivalence principle is the foundational symmetry of classical general relativity~\cite{Will2018}.
sentences.quote_normalized: the equivalence principle is the foundational symmetry of classical general relativity~.

sentences.quote: Weak EP (WEP): test masses follow the same trajectory in a gravitational field, regardless of internal composition. The violation parameter is $\eta = (a_1 - a_2)/\frac{1}{2}(a_1 + a_2)$. The MICROSCOPE satellite mission~\cite{Touboul2017} sets $|\eta| < 1.0 \times 10^{-15}$, the strongest current bound.
sentences.quote_normalized: weak ep (wep): test masses follow the same trajectory in a gravitational field, regardless of internal composition. the violation parameter is $\eta = (a_1 - a_2)/\frac{1}{2}(a_1 + a_2)$. the microscope satellite mission~ sets $|\eta| < 1.0 \times 10^{-15}$, the strongest current bound.
sentences.agent_notes: MICROSCOPE_BOUND = 1.0e-15 matches paper. Touboul2017 in registry.

sentences.quote: Einstein EP (EEP): WEP together with local Lorentz invariance and local position invariance.
sentences.quote_normalized: einstein ep (eep): wep together with local lorentz invariance and local position invariance.

sentences.quote: Strong EP (SEP): EEP extended to gravitational self-energy (Nordtvedt parameter $\eta_N$), tested by lunar laser ranging.
sentences.quote_normalized: strong ep (sep): eep extended to gravitational self-energy (nordtvedt parameter $\eta_n$), tested by lunar laser ranging.

sentences.quote: A mechanism that violates WEP thereby violates EEP and SEP.
sentences.quote_normalized: a mechanism that violates wep thereby violates eep and sep.

sentences.quote: The 6x3 classification matrix is the substantive output: it surfaces both the vestigial-only character of the project's EP-violation surface and the eta-scale separations relevant to near-term satellite EP tests.
sentences.quote_normalized: the 6x3 classification matrix is the substantive output: it surfaces both the vestigial-only character of the project's ep-violation surface and the eta-scale separations relevant to near-term satellite ep tests.
sentences.agent_notes: 6 mechanisms x 3 EP levels matches Lean enumeration.

sentences.quote: Vestigial differential coupling. In a phase where the metric correlator is non-zero but the tetrad VEV vanishes, bosons couple minimally to the metric, while fermions require a non-zero tetrad VEV to couple to gravity. The differential coupling parameter takes the maximal value 1 in this phase. The corresponding eta_max = 1 is already incompatible with any current EP precision.
sentences.quote_normalized: vestigial differential coupling. in a phase where the metric correlator is non-zero but the tetrad vev vanishes, bosons couple minimally to the metric, while fermions require a non-zero tetrad vev to couple to gravity. the differential coupling parameter takes the maximal value 1 in this phase. the corresponding eta_max = 1 is already incompatible with any current ep precision.

sentences.quote: Vestigial relics. In the full-tetrad phase, residual differential coupling from topological-defect remnants gives $\eta \sim 10^{-18}$. This is sub-MICROSCOPE but within reach of next-generation satellite tests (STEP-class, eta ~ 10^{-18} target).
sentences.quote_normalized: vestigial relics. in the full-tetrad phase, residual differential coupling from topological-defect remnants gives $\eta \sim 10^{-18}$. this is sub-microscope but within reach of next-generation satellite tests (step-class, eta ~ 10^{-18} target).

sentences.quote: Einstein--Cartan torsion-trace coupling. A torsion-loop dark-matter mechanism in Einstein--Cartan gravity. Its failure mode as a cold-dark-matter candidate is kinematic --- the equation of state is $w = 1/3$ rather than $w = 0$ --- not an EP violation. The torsion-trace loop coupling is universal across charged species, so no species-dependent acceleration arises at tree level.
sentences.quote_normalized: einstein--cartan torsion-trace coupling. a torsion-loop dark-matter mechanism in einstein--cartan gravity. its failure mode as a cold-dark-matter candidate is kinematic --- the equation of state is $w = 1/3$ rather than $w = 0$ --- not an ep violation. the torsion-trace loop coupling is universal across charged species, so no species-dependent acceleration arises at tree level.

sentences.quote: Fracton subdiffusion. Pretko-style dipole-conservation enforces universal mobility decay across all matter species~\cite{Pretko2017}. The subdiffusion rate is identical for all species (the underlying constraint is a charge-conservation relation), so no WEP violation arises.
sentences.quote_normalized: fracton subdiffusion. pretko-style dipole-conservation enforces universal mobility decay across all matter species~. the subdiffusion rate is identical for all species (the underlying constraint is a charge-conservation relation), so no wep violation arises.

sentences.quote: Thomas--Fermi superfluid dark matter. Berezhiani--Khoury single-field condensate dark matter~\cite{Berezhiani2015} with uniform coupling to gravity. The Thomas--Fermi profile is composition-independent; phenomenology appears in galactic merger sonic-boom signatures, not in EP tests.
sentences.quote_normalized: thomas--fermi superfluid dark matter. berezhiani--khoury single-field condensate dark matter~ with uniform coupling to gravity. the thomas--fermi profile is composition-independent; phenomenology appears in galactic merger sonic-boom signatures, not in ep tests.

sentences.quote: Hidden-sector Z_16 singlets. Standard-Model-singlet dark-matter candidates carrying the Z_16 topological charge but no Standard-Model gauge charge. Decoupled from visible-sector EP tests by construction.
sentences.quote_normalized: hidden-sector z_16 singlets. standard-model-singlet dark-matter candidates carrying the z_16 topological charge but no standard-model gauge charge. decoupled from visible-sector ep tests by construction.

sentences.quote: The classification ships as a Lean~4 formalization in \texttt{lean/SKEFTHawking/EquivalencePrinciple.lean}. Three EP levels \texttt{WEP}, \texttt{EEP}, \texttt{SEP} are encoded as an inductive type with a numerical-order projection. Six mechanisms form a second inductive enumeration. The function \texttt{violationLevel} assigns each mechanism its weakest violated level, or \texttt{none}. Decidable predicates \texttt{violatesAt} and \texttt{satisfiesAt} implement the level propagation: a WEP-violator violates WEP, EEP, and SEP via the order projection.
sentences.quote_normalized: the classification ships as a lean~4 formalization in lean/skefthawking/equivalenceprinciple.lean. three ep levels wep, eep, sep are encoded as an inductive type with a numerical-order projection. six mechanisms form a second inductive enumeration. the function violationlevel assigns each mechanism its weakest violated level, or none. decidable predicates violatesat and satisfiesat implement the level propagation: a wep-violator violates wep, eep, and sep via the order projection.
sentences.agent_notes: EquivalencePrinciple.violationLevel + violatesAt + satisfiesAt all exist in lean_deps.

sentences.quote: Six per-mechanism classifications (*_violates_WEP for the two vestigial mechanisms, *_satisfies_all_EP for the remaining four).
sentences.quote_normalized: six per-mechanism classifications (*_violates_wep for the two vestigial mechanisms, *_satisfies_all_ep for the remaining four).

sentences.quote: A central structural statement \texttt{ep\_violation\_is\_vestigial\_only}: among the six mechanisms, exactly the two vestigial-phase phenomena violate WEP.
sentences.quote_normalized: a central structural statement ep\_violation\_is\_vestigial\_only: among the six mechanisms, exactly the two vestigial-phase phenomena violate wep.

sentences.quote: A consistency theorem \texttt{vestigial\_microscope\_violation\_consistent} pinning the classification's commitment for vestigial gravity to the project's companion module on dark-sector classification.
sentences.quote_normalized: a consistency theorem vestigial\_microscope\_violation\_consistent pinning the classification's commitment for vestigial gravity to the project's companion module on dark-sector classification.

sentences.quote: Distinguishability theorems \texttt{vestigial\_vs\_fangGu\_distinct\_EP\_profile} and \texttt{distinct\_violationLevel\_implies\_distinct\_mechanism}.
sentences.quote_normalized: distinguishability theorems vestigial\_vs\_fanggu\_distinct\_ep\_profile and distinct\_violationlevel\_implies\_distinct\_mechanism.

sentences.quote: A structural lemma \texttt{violatesAt\_mono} encoding the hierarchical subsumption of EP levels.
sentences.quote_normalized: a structural lemma violatesat\_mono encoding the hierarchical subsumption of ep levels.

sentences.quote: Quantitative anchors: vestigial_phase_eta_violates_microscope_bound (eta_max=1.0 > 10^{-15}, norm_num-backed), step_target_can_test_vestigial_relics, and vestigial_relics_below_microscope_bound.
sentences.quote_normalized: quantitative anchors: vestigial_phase_eta_violates_microscope_bound (eta_max=1.0 > 10^{-15}, norm_num-backed), step_target_can_test_vestigial_relics, and vestigial_relics_below_microscope_bound.

sentences.quote: A cross-module bridge \texttt{fangGu\_failure\_mode\_is\_kinematic\_not\_ep}, which imports the Einstein--Cartan torsion module and invokes the torsion-trace obstruction theorem to confirm that the failure mode of that mechanism is kinematic rather than EP-related.
sentences.quote_normalized: a cross-module bridge fanggu\_failure\_mode\_is\_kinematic\_not\_ep, which imports the einstein--cartan torsion module and invokes the torsion-trace obstruction theorem to confirm that the failure mode of that mechanism is kinematic rather than ep-related.

sentences.quote: A Python mirror at \texttt{src/equivalence\_principle/} provides the identical classification as a dictionary lookup, $32$ \texttt{pytest} cases pinning Python and Lean to numerical agreement, and four named numerical constants: MICROSCOPE_BOUND = 1.0e-15, STEP_TARGET = 1.0e-18, VESTIGIAL_PHASE_ETA_MAX = 1.0, VESTIGIAL_RELICS_ETA = 1.0e-18.
sentences.quote_normalized: a python mirror at src/equivalence\_principle/ provides the identical classification as a dictionary lookup, $32$ pytest cases pinning python and lean to numerical agreement, and four named numerical constants: microscope_bound = 1.0e-15, step_target = 1.0e-18, vestigial_phase_eta_max = 1.0, vestigial_relics_eta = 1.0e-18.

sentences.quote: Figure caption: Equivalence-principle violation matrix and eta-scale comparison. Two vestigial mechanisms violate all three EP levels; four non-vestigial mechanisms satisfy all three. Right panel locates eta_max=1, MICROSCOPE bound 10^{-15}, vestigial-relic 10^{-18}, STEP target 10^{-18}.
sentences.quote_normalized: figure caption: equivalence-principle violation matrix and eta-scale comparison. two vestigial mechanisms violate all three ep levels; four non-vestigial mechanisms satisfy all three. right panel locates eta_max=1, microscope bound 10^{-15}, vestigial-relic 10^{-18}, step target 10^{-18}.

sentences.quote: Vestigial-only violation surface. Among six mechanisms spanning four distinct dark-sector physics families, only the two vestigial-phase phenomena violate the equivalence principle. This is the load-bearing substantive content: any positive EP-violation result at $\eta \in [10^{-19}, 10^{-15}]$ implies vestigial physics within this dark-sector landscape.
sentences.quote_normalized: vestigial-only violation surface. among six mechanisms spanning four distinct dark-sector physics families, only the two vestigial-phase phenomena violate the equivalence principle. this is the load-bearing substantive content: any positive ep-violation result at $\eta \in [10^{-19}, 10^{-15}]$ implies vestigial physics within this dark-sector landscape.

sentences.quote: Two distinct vestigial $\eta$ scales. Within the vestigial family, the in-phase mechanism (eta_max=1, already excluded) and the relic mechanism (eta ~ 10^{-18}, sub-MICROSCOPE) sit at very different scales. The MICROSCOPE bound separates them.
sentences.quote_normalized: two distinct vestigial $\eta$ scales. within the vestigial family, the in-phase mechanism (eta_max=1, already excluded) and the relic mechanism (eta ~ 10^{-18}, sub-microscope) sit at very different scales. the microscope bound separates them.

sentences.quote: Cross-mechanism distinguishability. The four non-violating mechanisms are degenerate by EP status alone (all satisfy all three levels), so EP tests alone cannot distinguish them; distinguishability requires additional kinematic equation-of-state signatures.
sentences.quote_normalized: cross-mechanism distinguishability. the four non-violating mechanisms are degenerate by ep status alone (all satisfy all three levels), so ep tests alone cannot distinguish them; distinguishability requires additional kinematic equation-of-state signatures.

sentences.quote: A positive next-generation satellite-EP-test result at $\eta \sim 10^{-18}$ would corroborate the vestigial-relics mechanism and place a bound on the underlying defect-remnant density. A null result at $\eta \lesssim 10^{-19}$ excludes vestigial-relic-induced violations and forces a re-examination of which late-time emergent-gravity phase the substrate occupies.
sentences.quote_normalized: a positive next-generation satellite-ep-test result at $\eta \sim 10^{-18}$ would corroborate the vestigial-relics mechanism and place a bound on the underlying defect-remnant density. a null result at $\eta \lesssim 10^{-19}$ excludes vestigial-relic-induced violations and forces a re-examination of which late-time emergent-gravity phase the substrate occupies.

sentences.quote: The next steps integrate this classification with cosmological perturbation constraints (different EP profiles produce distinct CMB-polarization signatures via differential coupling of photons versus neutrinos) and with energy-condition analyses, since mechanisms violating SEP may also violate the dominant energy condition on the relevant emergent stress-energy tensor.
sentences.quote_normalized: the next steps integrate this classification with cosmological perturbation constraints (different ep profiles produce distinct cmb-polarization signatures via differential coupling of photons versus neutrinos) and with energy-condition analyses, since mechanisms violating sep may also violate the dominant energy condition on the relevant emergent stress-energy tensor.
sentences.agent_notes: Note: forward reference; actual CMB-polarization and energy-condition cross-modules not currently computed in EquivalencePrinciple.
